label: Census
description: Sync data from your warehouse to CRMs, ad platforms, and other tools using Census's Reverse ETL platform.

form.title: Connect Census
form.subtitle: Paste your Census API key to let Anton read syncs, segments, and destination statuses.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste a Census API key generated from Settings → API. Fastest setup — no OAuth client required.
methods.how_to:
## Generate a Census API Key

1. Log in to [Census](https://app.getcensus.com).
2. Click your workspace name in the top-left, then go to **Settings**.
3. In the left sidebar, select **API**.
4. Click **Create API Key**, give it a descriptive name like `Anton`, and confirm.
5. Copy the key shown — it is only displayed once.
6. Paste it into the **API Key** field below.

## Notes

- API keys are scoped to your Census workspace. If you belong to multiple workspaces, generate a separate key per workspace.
- Keys do not expire by default, but you can revoke them at any time from the same **Settings → API** page.
- Store the key securely — anyone with it has API-level access to your Census workspace.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found in Census → Settings → API. Shown only once at creation time.

fields.name: workspace_id
fields.label: Workspace ID (optional)
fields.description: Optional. If you belong to multiple Census workspaces, enter the numeric workspace ID to target a specific one.
